name: Quick Croissants
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 5 minutes | cooking time 20 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out the puff pastry into a large rectangle if ¼-inch thick. Cut the pastry into triangles.
Roll out the triangles to form the croissants. Arrange them on the prepared baking sheet.
Brush the croissants with the lightly whisked egg. Sprinkle each with the sugar.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
